title: Bindiya Chamkegi
subTitle: Bindiya Chamkegi

title: Mera Balam Thanedaar
subTitle: A teenage girl who believes in supporting lies for benevolent reasons marries a duty-driven police officer under unfortunate circumstances in the state of Rajasthan, India.

title: Parineetii
subTitle: Neeti asks Rajeev to pick her mother up at the train station. Unbeknownst to him, Parineet goes to the station as well.

title: Shakti Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki
subTitle: People show up with a poster of Soumya and demand an explanation from Harak Singh, making Soumya confront Kareena.

title: Parineetii
subTitle: Neeti asks Rajeev to pick her mother up at the train station. Unbeknownst to him, Parineet goes to the station as well.

title: Mata Saraswati
subTitle: Navigating 14 worlds, Goddess Saraswati, the celestial embodiment of wisdom and art, seeks the arcane knowledge needed to restore Lord Narayan's severed head.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Digger and Rocky help Ryder fill the pool with water. The PAW Patrol steps in to help when the animals are late for the circus.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Rubble is pretending to be a super pup but gets himself in trouble. When Ryder's Robot Pup breaks and starts going wild around Adventure Bay, it takes the whole PAW Patrol to help Ryder find it.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: An alien spaceship crash lands at Farmer Yumi's. Now it's up to the gang to help out the stranded little extraterrestrial by fixing his ship and getting him back to his home planet.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Cap'n Turbot and his cousin Francois get rescued. Chompy the Beaver takes a liking to the wood at Farmer Yumi's Farm.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: While celebrating Friendship Day, the pups must prevent Mayor Humdinger from ruining Adventure Bay's reputation as the friendliest town on the map.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Rubble finds an old, brass jack-in-the-box with a genie inside who grants him three wishes. Francois Turbot prepares to walk a tightrope between the top of the bridge and the lookout tower.

title: Motu Patlu
subTitle: Best friends Motu and Patlu live in Furfuri Nagar. When they land in the most hilarious situations, Motu is the one who generally creates problems, while Patlu tries to solve them.

subTitle: Motu learns forgiveness, but his newfound tolerance sets a dangerous thief free. Can he make up for his mistake?

title: Khatra Khatra Khatra
subTitle: Bharti and Harsh stand against each other in the Khatra elections. Their hilarious campaign, including their party symbols, has the audience in splits.

title: Salaam-E-Ishq
subTitle: Aaliya and Zain are forced to get married to each other. However, they don't have any feelings for each other, except hatred.

title: Sasural Simar Ka
subTitle: Veena and Totan go to meet Simar and Roli on Rakhi. Simar packs for her honeymoon. Roli wants to return home but is asked to stay until Simar and Prem return. Simar decides to tell Prem everything.

title: Shakti Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki
subTitle: Soumya is shocked after finding out that Varun's lie killed Kareena's mother. Preeto criticises Soumya for confronting Varun about the matter.

title: Sindoor Ek Vachan
subTitle: Shantanu, a man of conviction who lives life according to his own principles, crosses paths with Poorna, who alters both his way of life and his worldview.

subTitle: Forced by fate to marry a rich, shrewd politician, Suman embraces obstacles adjusting to her new life while dealing with her sister-in-law who seeks to become the head of the household.

subTitle: Rajeev arrives home for the puja at his house, but he does not know that Neeti's mother also joins them.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: The PAW Patrol heads to the jungle to help their friend find his lost parrot, and the PAW Patrol discovers a beehive in Cap'n Turbot's lighthouse.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: When Marshall begins to feel like his clumsy ways are ruining his friends' fun, he decides to take a break from the PAW Patrol and goes off to the woods. Cali becomes an unsuspecting stowaway when she is accidentally packed up into the Paw Patroller.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Ryder investigates when jets of water start springing up all over town. The PAW Patrol helps a rancher find a spooked horse.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Marshall wakes from a nap to find a real, fire-breathing dragon guarding a sleeping Katie in the Lookout Tower. The pups build a house for three little piglets.

subTitle: Cap'n Turbot stumbles into a secret cavern that was once a pirate's hideout, the PAW Patrol searches for clues to find the missing pieces of a treasure map.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Someone has been swiping fish off Cap'n Turbot's boat. Adventure Bay's newest dolphin pup accidentally swims into a shallow-water stream.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: When the pups and Cap'n Turbot camp out under a magical moon, they are transformed into merpups so they can perform an underwater rescue.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Mayor Goodway asks the PAW Patrol to rescue her twin niece and nephew from a tree. Mayor Goodway receives a package of piglets instead of the fireworks she was expecting.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: The pups must come to the rescue when a family of monkeys scatters into the jungle after being scared off by lava erupting from a volcano.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: The pups must chase down Mayor Humdinger and the Kit-tastrophe Crew when they steal gold discovered in Adventure Bay. Mayor Humdinger orders the Kit-tastrophe Crew to steal the Paw Patroller.
